concepts.headline: Better feedback loops, not better ideas.
concepts.subtext: The best founders optimize for how quickly they can learn what is wrong with their current idea.
concepts.layout_description: Centered statement composition with FLYWHEEL watermark behind at 0.03 opacity. The headline sits at 52px bold, sentence case, centered with generous vertical padding. A 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) sits above the headline, fading left to right, spanning 80px. Below the headline, the subtext appears in 18px regular weight at #555, centered, max-width 520px. Particle dot network scattered across the right half at 0.08 opacity adds subtle texture. 72px padding on all edges. Logo mark anchored bottom-center in #888 at 13px DM Mono uppercase. 60% of the canvas is pure white negative space.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff. Headline #111. Subtext #555. Accent bar #d7c8af. Particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.08 opacity. Logo #888.
concepts.reasoning: A single powerful insight deserves the pull quote treatment. The centered composition with FLYWHEEL watermark and warm sand accent bar creates editorial gravity without decoration. The quote's authority comes from restraint, not ornamentation.

concepts.headline: Speed of iteration beats quality of hypothesis.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout on a warm off-white #faf9f6 surface. The headline sits at 54px, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.04em, anchored to a strong left alignment edge at 72px from the left edge. The headline breaks across two lines naturally. Below, a 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) spans 120px, left-aligned, separating the headline from the subtext. The subtext 'Every time.' sits at 20px, #333, left-aligned, functioning as a deliberate emphatic coda. The right 40% of the canvas is reserved for a particle dot network at 0.10 opacity, creating asymmetric balance. FLYWHEEL wordmark anchored bottom-left in DM Mono 11px uppercase at #888. 72px edge padding throughout. 65% negative space.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6. Headline #111. Accent bar #d7c8af. Subtext #333. Particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.10 opacity. Wordmark #888.
concepts.reasoning: The post's core argument is a declarative principle, not a quote or list. A bold statement card with left-anchored typography and the emphatic 'Every time.' as subtext mirrors the post's rhetorical rhythm. The warm off-white surface adds premium texture while the left-heavy asymmetric layout is quintessentially Flywheel.

concepts.headline: The best builders learn faster, not smarter.
concepts.subtext: Speed of iteration over quality of initial hypothesis. Sequoia partners see this pattern in every breakout founder.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero on white #ffffff background. A small DM Mono eyebrow label reads 'FOUNDER MINDSET' in 11px uppercase, letter-spacing 0.08em, at #888, positioned at top-left. Below, a 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) at 40px width separates the eyebrow from the headline. Headline at 48px, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.03em, #111, left-aligned, breaking across two lines. Subtext at 17px, #555, left-aligned, max-width 480px, sits 32px below the headline. The right 45% of the canvas is pure negative space anchored by a subtle particle dot network at 0.07 opacity. FLYWHEEL wordmark at bottom-left in DM Mono 11px uppercase, #888. 80px edge padding. 65% negative space.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff. Eyebrow label #888. Accent bar #d7c8af. Headline #111. Subtext #555. Particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.07 opacity. Wordmark #888.
concepts.reasoning: The headline subtext card contextualizes the insight with an editorial eyebrow label, grounding the abstract principle in a publication-style frame. The Sequoia attribution becomes subtext rather than decoration, preserving visual hierarchy while honoring the post's sourcing.

selection_reasoning: Concept 1 (bold_statement_card) best embodies Flywheel's editorial restraint. The core post argument is a declared principle with a one-line coda, exactly the structure the bold statement modality is designed for. The left-anchored layout with asymmetric particle dot field, warm off-white surface, and 'Every time.' as a stark emphatic subtext mirrors the post's rhetorical punch. It communicates authority through reduction, which is the Flywheel brand signature.
